runTitle: Local Playwright QA - AI detail dialog sidebar/workspace verification

environment.backend: local dev proxy + Cloud Run upstream

coveredSurfaces: /dashboard AI sidebar structured response detail sections

artifacts.label: Local AI detail dialog console errors

notes: Local targeted QA against commit d910e65015a86c48b6ab1ecdeaba69b99b0eb2e4 after assistant detail dialog edge-case fixes.
Sidebar AI Chat accepted /qa-thinking-visualizer and rendered a detail dialog with 전체 응답, AI 처리 단계, 도구 실행 결과, 메타 정보.
Fullscreen AI workspace restored the same conversation and rendered a detail dialog for the assistant response without blank-content regression.

Captured browser console errors were limited to Next.js dev HMR websocket handshake noise (net::ERR_INVALID_HTTP_RESPONSE on /_next/webpack-hmr); no feature-specific runtime error was observed during the tested flow.
